# Release v6.6.3

## Installation

Download the latest release from [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/mgsgde/whisper-shortcut/releases).

## Changes

### Gemini Chat

- **Code blocks**: Fenced Markdown code is extracted and shown with language-aware styling for easier reading.
- **Math notation**: LaTeX-style expressions in replies are converted for clearer on-screen rendering.
- **Images**: The response model supports inline binary image data when the model returns generated images in chat.

## Full Changelog

For a complete list of changes since v6.6.2, see the [full changelog](https://github.com/mgsgde/whisper-shortcut/compare/v6.6.2...v6.6.3).
